status: PARTIAL: reformulation transfers to the M31 Chebyshev domain + one new proved structural lemma (Chebyshev-fold self-similarity) + faithful-toy measurements + exact dead-route margins; the inverse bound itself stays OPEN (the crux). No counterexample found at faithful toys.
object: The signed-e_m max-fiber inverse at the binding Mersenne-31 list deployed row (a_+ = 1116023), viewed on its ACTUAL domain -- the Chebyshev / twin-coset (norm-one torus), NOT a multiplicative subgroup mu_n. Target: PR(Rhat) <= nu*_ref ~ 55, equivalently (STAR): sum_{t!=0}|e_m(v_t)| <= (K-1) C(n,a_+). Rhat(t)=e_m(v_t), v_t=(e_p(f_t(x)))_{x in D}, f_t(x)=sum_{i=1}^w t_i x^i, D the M31 Chebyshev domain.

binding_row_M31_list.source: grande_finale.tex prop:q-exact-target (L2061; Mersenne-31 list row); cap25_v13_m31_chebyshev_fixed_remainder_floor.md (constants + Domain correction); cap25_v13_qfin_rung_audit_m31.md (Chebyshev/circle geometry)

target_nu_ref.reading: row-sharp Q at M31-list FOLLOWS once the signed-e_m spectrum has effective (Fourier) support at most ~55 directions out of 2^2090857, calibrated by its own L^2 energy. The sharpest, most concrete standalone (STAR)-route target in the program.
target_nu_ref.caveat: nu_ref is the Gamma2-1 = 1 REFERENCE; the true budget is nu* = (K-1)^2/(Gamma2-1), sufficient whenever true Gamma2-1 <= 1. nu_ref is the RAW-spectrum target; the masked-residual variant PR(E_Q on P_Q) (O416) is the tighter, and at M31 the raw route is potentially overstrong (masked-residual audit).

dead_route_margins_M31_list.L2_pw2_floor_formula: (w/2)*log2(p) - log2(K-1); trivial-(full-)support Cauchy-Schwarz on the spectrum
dead_route_margins_M31_list.Linf_perdirection_formula: log2(p^w-1) - log2(K-1); a uniform |e_m|/C <= beta* must beat beta*=(K-1)/(p^w-1)
dead_route_margins_M31_list.note: Both routes DEAD at the M31-list row (even deader than KB: KB L2 floor 1045396.58, KB L-inf 2090815.35). The win can come only from sparsity (effective support) + cancellation -- the participation-ratio target -- not from any single-direction or second-moment inequality.

reduction.derivation: Divide (STAR)^2 by the fixed number ||Rhat||_2^2 = C^2(Gamma2-1) (Parseval, prop:fourier-audit). PR(Rhat) = ||Rhat||_1^2/||Rhat||_2^2 is the Fourier participation ratio = effective spectral support size.
reduction.note: This equivalence is pure algebra on the spectrum and holds for ANY domain D, including the M31 Chebyshev twin-coset. Imported from cap25_v13_q_em_inverse_participation_ratio.md (integrated e83962ae, was PR #414); re-verified here at the M31 domain via faithful-toy Parseval.

chebyshev_fold_lemma.name: Chebyshev-fold self-similarity (the faithful M31 analog of the packet's mu_n lemma L2)
chebyshev_fold_lemma.statement: If f_t is constant on the T_c-fibers of the M31 Chebyshev domain D (c | n; i.e. f_t(x) = g(T_c(x)) as a function on D), then T_c is exactly c-to-1 on D, the value multiset {f_t(x): x in D} is c copies of {g(y): y in D_c=T_c(D)}, and e_m(v_t) = [T^m]( E_g(T) )^c, E_g(T)=prod_{y in D_c}(1 + T e_p(g(y))) = sum_j e_j(w_g) T^j.
chebyshev_fold_lemma.status: PROVED (elementary; uses only that the T_2-tower is exactly 2-to-1, which the twin-coset construction guarantees) -- toy-verified to 2e-14 over 960 c=2 quotient directions at p=31,n=8.
chebyshev_fold_lemma.contrast_with_mu_n: The mu_n packet used x->x^c (multiplicative). At M31 the self-similarity is the Dickson/Chebyshev map T_c, and the clean descent identity lives in the CHEBYSHEV basis, not the monomial basis (ordinary power sums p_i do not vanish off multiples of c for a symmetric M -- cap25_v13_qfin_rung_audit_m31.md, identity (*_T)). The fiber-count identity is basis-independent (invertible triangular change of basis, char > w).

faithful_toy_measurements.note: Exhaustive enumeration, stdlib-only, ulimit -v 2097152. The Chebyshev toy is the x-projection of a standard-position twin coset gH U g^{-1}H (chi = Re, 2-to-1) of a 2-power subgroup of the circle group over F_{p^2}, p = 2^e - 1 a small Mersenne prime -- the exact toy analog of the deployed row (p'+1 = 2^31 a pure 2-group). Chebyshev T_2-tower verified n, n/2, ..., 1.

faithful_regime_avg_gg_1.reading: In the deployment-faithful (avg >> 1, w=1) regime the Chebyshev domain behaves essentially like the multiplicative domain: sparse spectrum (PR ~ 17 << 55 = nu_ref), raw (STAR) satisfied with large room (L1/C ~ 0.43 << 7.42 = K-1), atom easily holds (R ~ 1.30 << 8.42 = K). The inverse is almost certainly TRUE at M31-list; the wall is proof-method (consistent with kappa <= 1.221, O407).

offset_robustness.note: faithful measurement is robust across twin-coset offsets; not a single-coset artifact.

faithful_toy_measurements.falsification_guard: Near-bound / above-bound spikes (raw PR > nu_ref, L1/C > K-1) occur ONLY in the avg << 1 regime, where the ATOM ITSELF fails (R > K) -- so they are not counterexamples to inverse => atom, and not the deployment regime. The primitive stratum carries 90-98% of the L^1 mass in every w>=2 Chebyshev toy (faithful analog of the mu_n packet's 83-93%), so the wall is the PRIMITIVE spectrum, exactly as at KB. No near-nu_ref primitive spike without the conjectured (approximately-quotient) structure was found in the faithful regime.

verdict: PARTIAL. Established at the M31 Chebyshev domain: (1) target statement + provenance; (2) exact reproduction of nu_ref = 2^5.781 ~ 55; (3) the (STAR) <=> PR <= nu* reduction (transfers, domain-agnostic); (4) L1 value-distribution reduction (general); (5) NEW Chebyshev-fold self-similarity lemma (PROVED, toy-verified); (6) the L^2 (p^{w/2}) floor and L-infinity per-direction routes DEAD with exact M31 margins (1045425.61 / 2090854.11 bits); (7) faithful-toy instrumentation showing the inverse holds with large room and behaves like the mu_n domain. OPEN (the crux): the bound PR <= nu_ref itself. No counterexample at faithful toys.
obstruction: The finite-row primitive effective-support bound on the Chebyshev value-sequence (f_t(x))_{x in D}: the M31/Chebyshev counterpart of the open structural steps 4-6 of prob:entropy-inverse-q's rem:entropy-inverse-skeleton (entropy-BSG -> PFR/Green-Ruzsa -> slice-derivative, or the free-energy decay alternative), now with the Dickson/Chebyshev self-similarity in place of the multiplicative one. No single-direction (L-infinity) or second-moment (L^2) inequality can reach it (both dead by > 10^6 bits at this row).
nonclaims: does NOT prove U(1116023) <= B* or any deployed safe row
does NOT close prob:row-sharp-q (grande_finale.tex L2177) or def:q-row-atom (L2043)
does NOT prove the signed-e_m inverse / PR <= nu_ref at M31-list (the crux stays OPEN)
does NOT touch DannyExperiments' CAP25-V13-M31-C1024-PAIRED-PREFIX-PRIMITIVE-Q object (his; a different route)
the faithful toys are all w=1 (only way to reach avg >> 1 at small n,p); deployment has w=67447 -- the toy evidence is w=1 evidence, honestly extrapolated, exactly as in the mu_n packet
